title: Welsh Rarebit Spring Rolls
description: A fusion twist on traditional Welsh Rarebit, this Chinese-inspired recipe combines the savory flavors of cheese and spices with the crunch of spring roll wrappers.

ingredients.name: shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: cheddar or a similar strong cheese

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the Welsh Rarebit sauce and soy sauce.
Add the grated ginger and minced scallions to the bowl and stir to combine.
Place a spring roll wrapper on a flat surface and brush the edges with sesame oil.
Place about 1 tablespoon of the Welsh Rarebit mixture onto the center of the wrapper.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Place the spring rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the wrappers are crispy.
